product_overview: A mobile-first single-page web app that guides Eltex customers through uploading identity and property documents, signing region-specific legal authorizations, optionally completing an energy-certificate survey, and submitting a completed project to Eltex. Admin assessors access a password-protected dashboard to review and download submitted projects.
core_goals: Allow customers to locate their project by phone and complete all required documentation for an installation project without logging in.
Collect identity (DNI/NIE), property (IBI), and electricity bill documents and extract key data automatically for customer review.
Capture province selection to determine and collect the correct signed legal authorizations.
Collect optional energy-certificate technical data and a signature for the certificate.
Provide a single review checklist so customers can confirm all items and submit the project to Eltex.
Provide an assessor dashboard to view submitted projects and download complete project archives.

features.name: Phone Number Entry
features.description: Customers enter their Spanish mobile number to locate their pre-created project; a successful lookup redirects the customer into their project flow.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Type Spanish mobile number -> Submit phone number -> Be redirected to /?code=ELT20250001
Navigate to / -> Type unknown mobile number -> Submit phone number -> See error message indicating number not found

features.name: Property Document Upload
features.description: Customers upload identity (DNI/NIE), IBI certificate, and electricity bill (photos or PDFs). The app runs AI extraction on each document and presents the extracted fields for customer review and confirmation.
user_flows: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001 -> Upload DNI/NIE front photo -> See AI-extracted name, ID number and expiry populated for review -> If DNI card front-only detected, upload DNI back photo -> Upload IBI certificate as photo or PDF -> Upload electricity bill pages (one or more) -> See AI-extracted data populated for each document -> Proceed to province selection

Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001 -> Upload DNI/NIE front photo with poor quality -> See validation error asking for a clearer photo -> Re-upload clearer DNI/NIE front photo -> See AI-extracted data populated

features.name: Province Selection
features.description: Customer selects their province/region; the selection determines whether region-specific legal signing documents are required and which signing steps to present next.
user_flows: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001 -> Select province from list -> Proceed to representation when province requires signatures
Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001 -> Select a province with no signing requirement -> Skip representation and proceed to the next required step (energy certificate or review)

features.name: Legal Document Signing (Representation)
features.description: Customers sign the required region-specific legal PDFs using a canvas signature; the number of required signatures depends on the selected province (e.g., Cataluña = 3, Madrid/Valencia = 2, others = 0).
user_flows: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001 -> Draw signature on signature pad -> Apply signature to first legal document -> See signed PDF preview -> Draw signature on signature pad -> Apply signature to second legal document -> See signed PDF preview -> Draw signature on signature pad -> Apply signature to third legal document -> See final signed documents and proceed to energy certificate

Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001 -> Draw signature on signature pad -> Apply signature to first legal document -> See signed PDF preview -> If signature stroke is too small, redraw signature -> Apply corrected signature -> See updated signed PDF preview

features.name: Energy Certificate Survey
features.description: A four-step technical survey captures housing details required for the energy certificate; the customer may sign the completed certificate or skip the survey to allow an assessor to complete it later.
user_flows: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250004 -> Complete housing data: fill cadastral reference, habitable area, floor count and bedroom count -> Proceed to openings step
Complete openings step: enter door and window counts by orientation and select window frame material, glass type and shutter presence -> Proceed to thermal systems step
Complete thermal systems step: select water heater type, boiler fuel, air conditioning type and heating emitter type -> Proceed to additional info step
Complete additional info step: select product sold (solar, aerothermal or both) and indicate existing customer status and existing solar panels -> Sign the completed certificate -> Finalize survey
Navigate to /?code=ELT20250004 -> On the energy certificate start screen choose to skip the survey -> Proceed directly to review

features.name: Review and Submit
features.description: Presents a checklist of required items and their completion status so the customer can fix incomplete items and submit the full project to Eltex, culminating in a success confirmation.
user_flows: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001 -> View checklist showing completion status for all required items -> Select an incomplete item to return and fix it -> Return to review and see updated checklist status -> Submit documentation -> See success confirmation screen
Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001 -> View checklist and confirm all items are complete -> Submit documentation -> See success confirmation screen

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Password-protected dashboard for assessors to view submitted projects, inspect uploaded documents and extracted data, download project ZIPs, and export the project list as CSV.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Enter password eltex2025 to log in -> See list of submitted projects -> Select a project to view details -> View uploaded document images and AI-extracted data -> Download project ZIP -> Export projects list as CSV -> Log out
Navigate to /dashboard -> Enter incorrect password -> See authentication error and remain on login screen

code_summary.routing_notes: IMPORTANT: This is a pure SPA. ALL customer routes are accessed via the root path with a query param: /?code=ELTXXXXXX (e.g. /?code=ELT20250001). There are NO path-based customer routes like /property-docs or /review. The app uses internal React state to switch between sections (property-docs, province-selection, representation, energy-certificate, review, success). To test a specific section, navigate to /?code=ELTXXXXXX and the app routes automatically to the correct step based on form completion state. Test project ELT20250004 and ELT20250005 are pre-seeded for energy-certificate flow.

routes.description: Phone entry (no code). Navigate here and enter phone to find project.
Solar project — starts at property-docs step. All customer sections accessed via this root URL.
Solar project pre-seeded for energy-certificate flow testing
Admin dashboard. Password = eltex2025. Enter at /dashboard login page.

features.name: Phone Number Entry
features.description: Customer enters their Spanish mobile number. System looks up their project and redirects to the form with ?code=ELTXXXXXX.
user_interactions: Type phone number into input field
Click "Continuar" button to submit
See error message if number not found
Get redirected to /?code=ELTXXXXXX on success

features.name: Property Document Upload
features.description: Customer uploads identity document (DNI/NIE), IBI certificate, and electricity bill. AI extracts data from each document automatically.
user_interactions: Tap camera icon to upload DNI/NIE front photo
Review AI-extracted name, DNI number, expiry date
Tap to upload DNI back photo (required for card-front-only uploads)
Tap to upload IBI certificate photo or PDF
Tap to upload electricity bill (one or more pages)
Click "Siguiente" to proceed to province selection

features.name: Province Selection
features.description: Customer selects their province/region. This determines which legal signing documents are required.
user_interactions: Select province from dropdown or list
Click "Siguiente" to proceed

features.name: Legal Document Signing (Representation)
features.description: Customer signs region-specific legal PDFs using a canvas-based signature pad. Cataluña requires 3 signatures, Madrid/Valencia require 2, other provinces skip.
user_interactions: Draw signature on signature pad canvas
Tap "Firmar" to apply signature to document
Review signed PDF preview
Repeat for each required document
Click "Siguiente" to continue

features.name: Energy Certificate Survey
features.description: 4-step survey capturing technical housing data for the energy certificate. Customer signs the completed certificate.
user_interactions: Fill in cadastral reference, habitable area, floor count, bedroom count
Enter door and window counts by orientation (N/E/S/W)
Select window frame material, glass type, shutter presence
Select thermal installation type and boiler fuel
Select air conditioning type
Select heating emitter type
Select product sold (solar panels, aerothermal, or both)
Indicate if existing customer, if has solar panels
Draw signature on signature pad
Click "Finalizar" to complete or "Omitir" to skip

features.name: Review and Submit
features.description: Shows a checklist of all required items with completion status. Customer reviews all items and submits to Eltex.
user_interactions: View checklist of all submitted items
Click incomplete items to go back and fix them
Click "Enviar documentación" to submit
See success screen after submission

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Password-protected dashboard for Eltex assessors to view submitted projects, review documents, and download ZIPs.
user_interactions: Enter password "eltex2025" to log in
View list of all submitted projects
Click a project to view its details
View uploaded document images and extracted data
Click "Descargar ZIP" to download all project files
Click "Exportar CSV" to export project list
Click "Cerrar sesión" to log out

known_limitations.issue: Photos are stored as base64 in localStorage/IndexedDB — not sent to server during extraction, only metadata is synced
known_limitations.impact: Large images may hit localStorage quota on older devices

known_limitations.issue: Autocropper Python service may not be running in development
known_limitations.impact: Document photos will not be auto-straightened before AI extraction

known_limitations.issue: Province "other" is no longer a user-selectable option but exists in legacy data
known_limitations.impact: Old projects with location="other" will skip signing section correctly
